chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3654 of 2022 CP D 2977 of 2020 CP D 3115 of 2020 CP D 3808 of 2021 CP D 3816 of 2021 CP D 5198 of 2022 CP D 5199 of 2022 CP D 5200 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 10677/2022 2. For hearing of main case 30.01.2025 Mr. Ayan Mustafa Memon, advocate for the petitioner Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for respondent Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel these petitions are impugning show cause notices to which the petitioners shall respond before the issuing authority. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper for the impugned notices to be adjudicated, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid. These petitions are disposed off accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
